# js

Browser-side terminal initialization for Attractor web UI. Bridges xterm.js to WebSocket backend at `/api/terminal/ws`. Manages `sessionStorage` session IDs, automatic reconnect loops, Catppuccin Mocha color palette.

## Contents

[xterm-setup.js](./xterm-setup.js) exports `window.initTerminal`, `window.disposeTerminal`. Uses `buildWsUrl`, `connect`, `getSessionId`, `setSessionId` internally. Manages `window._terminalInstances` registry with `ws`, `terminal`, `fitAddon`, `resizeObserver`, `reconnectTimer`.

## Behavioral Contracts

- WebSocket URL: `wss://` or `ws://` + `window.location.host` + `/api/terminal/ws?session=${sessionId}&folder=${folderPath}`
- `buildWsUrl()` constructs URL with scheme `wss://` or `ws://`, host `window.location.host`, path `/api/terminal/ws`, query params `session` and `folder`
- `RECONNECT_DELAY = 1000`
- Session storage key pattern: `'terminal_session_' + containerId`
- Reconnect indicator ANSI sequence: `\r\n\x1b[33m[Reconnecting...]\x1b[0m\r\n`
- Binary type: `ws.binaryType = 'arraybuffer'`
- Resize message format: JSON `{type: 'resize', cols, rows}`
- Data input: `terminal.onData` transmits `TextEncoder` encoded bytes
- Session handshake: `ws.onmessage` parses JSON `{type: 'session'}`, extracts `msg.session_id`
- Terminal theme (Catppuccin Mocha):
  - `background: '#1e1e2e'`
  - `foreground: '#cdd6f4'`
  - `cursor: '#f5e0dc'`
  - `selectionBackground: '#585b70'`
  - ANSI black/red/green/yellow/blue/magenta/cyan/white and bright variants (full palette defined)

## API Surface

`window.initTerminal(containerId, folderPath)` attaches terminal to DOM `containerId`, initializes WebSocket connection, registers global instance.

`window.disposeTerminal(containerId)` closes `ws`, calls `terminal.dispose()`, clears `reconnectTimer`, disconnects `ResizeObserver`, removes `sessionStorage` key `'terminal_session_' + containerId`, deletes entry from `window._terminalInstances`.

## Resource Registry

`window._terminalInstances` stores per-container objects with fields: `ws`, `terminal`, `reconnectTimer`, `fitAddon`, `resizeObserver`. `getSessionId()` and `setSessionId(id)` wrap `sessionStorage` access.
